evals.name: trigger-add-api-route
evals.prompt: How do I add a new Express API route in this project?

assertions.text: Describes the setupXRoute(app, db) module pattern, registering it in createApiRouter(db) in router.js, and the try/catch + console.error + 500 error shape

evals.name: trigger-mongo-access
evals.prompt: How should a route query MongoDB and validate the id?

assertions.text: Explains using the injected db (mongoConnect singleton) and validating ids with parseObjectId from dbHelpers.js before an _id query

evals.name: negative-auth-flow
evals.prompt: How does the email security-code verification flow work?

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vue-ssr-server; auth flow specifics route to vue-ssr-auth instead
